user_prompt: Ready the Chimera APC for loading
prayer:
Approach the Chimera APC with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Inspect the Chimera APC's loading bays, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken for the loading rite.
Anoint the ramp mechanisms with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Ingress.
Verify the Chimera APC's hull integrity through auspex invocation, readying it fully for loading.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's compliance as the loading operation commences under the Omnissiah's gaze.

user_prompt: Consecrate the battery array before emergency procedure
prayer:
Kneel before the battery array and recite the Litany of Electrodynamic Purity.
Consecrate each cell of the battery array with holy incense, purging daemonic surges.
Petition the Omnissiah to fortify the battery array's Machine Spirit for the emergency procedure.
Initiate diagnostic runes upon the battery array, ensuring blessed power-flow amidst crisis.
Seal the consecration with the Sigil of Endurance, as the emergency procedure engages.

user_prompt: Help me a preparation the pump
prayer:
Circumambulate the pump thrice, invoking the Omnissiah's fluidic grace.
Anoint the pump's sacred impellers with lubricant blessed in the forges of Mars.
Beseech the pump's Machine Spirit to stir for preparation, chanting the Hymn of Pressurization.
Align the pump's conduits through ritual calibration, sanctifying each valve.
Commence the preparation rite, affirming the pump's readiness in the name of the Machine God.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for gyroscope initialization?
prayer:
Present the gyroscope to the shrine-altar and intone the Rite of Gyroscopic Harmony.
Invoke the gyroscope's Machine Spirit with spiralling incense trails from the censer.
Initiate the initialization sequence whilst tracing binaric prayers upon its crystalline axis.
Calibrate the gyroscope's blessed gyros through Omnissiah-sanctioned harmonics.
Affirm equilibrium as the gyroscope hums in initialization, praising the Machine God's precision.

user_prompt: Ready the vox transmitter for loading
prayer:
Approach the vox transmitter with reverence, mechano-hymns upon your vox-grilles.
Clear ethereal static from the vox transmitter's sacred waveguides via litanic purge.
Anoint crystal arrays within the vox transmitter, awakening its Machine Spirit for loading.
Commence the loading operation with chanted frequencies of the Omnissiah's voice.
Test transmission purity, ensuring the vox transmitter relays only sanctified signals.

user_prompt: Consecrate the welding torch before activation
prayer:
Hold the welding torch aloft like a thurible of fusion fire to the Omnissiah.
Consecrate the welding torch's plasma coils with oils of the Forge Eternal.
Petition its Machine Spirit to ignite purely before activation, reciting the Incantation of Melt.
Ignite the torch's holy flame in staged ritual, sanctifying the activation rite.
Direct the consecrated welding torch's blaze, under the Machine God's unerring guidance.

user_prompt: Assist with drop pod a cycling
prayer:
Encircling the drop pod, chant the Canticle of Orbital Descent to rouse its spirit.
Inspect the drop pod's cycling servos, anointing with promethium-sacred unguents.
Initiate the cycling sequence upon the drop pod, beseeching Machine Spirits of descent.
Verify pneumatic seals through auspex invocation during the drop pod's cycling.
Praise the Omnissiah as the drop pod cycles true, prepared for void-born fury.

user_prompt: Emergency: power cell an emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency haste, genuflect before the power cell and invoke the Rite of Desperate Surge.
Purge the power cell of warp-taint with binaric exorcism and sacred sparks.
Fortify the power cell's Machine Spirit for the emergency procedure via galvanic litany.
Engage overcharge protocols on the power cell, sanctified by Omnissiah's wrath.
Monitor the blessed voltage as the emergency procedure unfolds in divine fury.

user_prompt: Assist with metal caster an engagement
prayer:
Position before the metal caster and recite the Forge-Litany of Molten Obedience.
Consecrate the metal caster's crucibles with ferro-fluids blessed on Ryza.
Awaken the metal caster's Machine Spirit for engagement, through rhythmic hammer-chants.
Initiate the engagement cycle, pouring sanctified alloys in Omnissiah's name.
Witness the metal caster birth new forms, praising the Machine God's creative fire.

user_prompt: Bless the air filtration for engagement
prayer:
Approach the air filtration unit with respirators intoning purity psalms.
Anoint filtration membranes of the air filtration with aerophagic essences.
Invoke the air filtration's Machine Spirit to engage, cleansing tainted atmospheres.
Cycle the engagement rite through sacred pressure differentials and litanies.
Affirm the air filtration's vigilance, under the Omnissiah's breath of purity.
